records.ety: [NL., from E. Siva + Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/ a beast, an animal.]

defs: A genus of very large extinct ruminants found in the Tertiary formation of India. The snout was prolonged in the form of a proboscis. The male had four horns, the posterior pair being large and branched. It was allied to the antelopes, but very much larger than any existing species.
